title: Time On Display
description: Do you play in full screen? Now you can see the time in real life by pressing just one key!
body:
![Banner](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Time_on_Display/BH_TOD_header.webp) Are you used to playing Minecraft in full screen? So I'm sure that more than once you've had to look at your phone, or leave the full screen to see what time it is, don't worry, now you can see it in the middle of the game, by pressing a single key, F8. In addition, you can also check the time in Minecraft, so you can know if it is day or night, or how long it is until dawn. It's great! ### Do you need a server to play with your friends?

For exceptional server hosting services, look no further than **[BisectHosting](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)**. Of course, you can install all the mods or modpacks you want, and their support team is always available to help you. **[With the code "Lupin" you will get a 25% discount! Click here!](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin)** ![Summary](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Time_on_Display/BH_TOD_summary.webp) Do you play in full screen, don't you have a clock, do you have to turn on your cell phone to know what time it is? Then Time On Display is the ideal solution for your game, since you only have to press the F8 key (configurable) to know what time it is. Moreover, it will not only tell you the real world time, it will also show the Minecraft time, again, this is something you can configure, as well as the location where the clock is displayed. ![FAQ](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Time_on_Display/BH_TOD_faq.webp) ### Does it work on servers? ### Sure! Remember that the best way to play with mods and friends is with BisectHosting, and by **[clicking on this link you can get a 25% discount](https://bisecthosting.com/lupin).** ### Can this mod be used in modpacks? ### Of course! As long as it is published only on Modrinth or CurseForge. Uploading it to any other platform would be violating our rights and is not allowed at all. However, we are really grateful if you consider adding it to your Modrinth or CurseForge modpack. If you need any small changes or have any questions, contact us! ![Screenshots](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/Time_on_Display/BH_TOD_screenshots.webp) ![Screenshots](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3e0bb1abc19407110ac3c1593d6536caf6ff5c4c.png) [![DISCORD](https://www.bisecthosting.com/images/CF/MultiRecipe/BH_Lupin_Discord.webp)](https://discord.gg/X8VY5WMbe4) .
